leadText: Nickit (Japanese: クスネ Kusune) is a Dark-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves into Thievul starting at level 18.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Nickit is an orange-maroon fox-like Pokémon with a slender body and a large head relative to its body size. It has long, black ears, white spots on its head that resemble eyebrows, and small dots around its eyes that gives the appearance of tears and mask-like markings around its yellow eyes. Nickit also has tufts of furs on both sides of its head. It has a white belly and chest, its feet are black, and its tail is long with a black tip resembling a sack. A cunning thief, Nickit enjoys stealing food from others instead of spending their time finding food on their own. They have incredibly soft pads that compress lightly when in contact with the ground, allowing them to move silently without being noticed. They can use their tails to sweep their paw prints so it can be hard to locate them. It has a fierce rivalry with Purrloin . Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Nickit evolves into Thievul . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Nickit Dark → First Evolution Thievul Dark

sections.text: Contents 1 Game data 1.1 Pokédex entries 1.2 Game locations 1.3 Stats 1.3.1 Base stats 1.4 Type effectiveness 1.5 Learnset 1.5.1 By leveling up 1.5.2 By TM 1.6 Side game data 1.7 Evolution data 1.8 Sprites Game data [ edit | edit source ] Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VIII. Generation VIII Galar #029 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains. Shield Cunning and cautious, this Pokémon survives by stealing food from others. It erases its tracks with swipes of its tail as it makes off with its plunder. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #064 This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Scarlet and Violet . Legends: Z-A It filches food from people and Pokémon alike. While fleeing the scene, it wipes its tracks away with its tail to throw off pursuers. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN004 Nickit Goh's Rotom Phone Nickit, the Fox Pokémon. A Dark type. Nickit likes to steal food that other Pokémon have found. It uses its fluffy tail to erase any footprints it leaves behind.
